national_indicators_available:
• Organically farmed agricultural land
  • Progress toward productive and sustainable agriculture (proxy)
comparison_sdg: The time series "Progress toward productive and sustainable agriculture (proxy)" is compliant with the global metadata. The time series "Organically farmed agricultural land" are not compliant with the UN metadata, but provide additional information.
indicator_name: Proportion of agricultural area under productive and sustainable agriculture
target_name: By 2030, ensure sustainable food production systems and implement resilient agricultural practices that increase productivity and production, that help maintain ecosystems, that strengthen capacity for adaptation to climate change, extreme weather, drought, flooding and other disasters and that progressively improve land and soil quality

data_start_values.value: Progress toward productive and sustainable agriculture (proxy)

footer_fields.series: Progress toward productive and sustainable agriculture (proxy)
footer_fields.label: Notes
footer_fields.value:
• Data is only available from 2015.
• Score for current status:
• 1 to < 1.5: Very far from achieving productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 1.5 to < 2.5: Far from achieving productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 2.5 to < 3.5: At a moderate distance to achieving productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 3.5 to < 4.5: Close to achieving productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 4.5 to 5: Productive and sustainable agriculture already achieved.
• Score for trend:
• 1 to < 1.5: Deterioration away from productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 1.5 to < 2.5: Slight deterioration from productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 2.5 to < 3.5: No improvement towards productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 3.5 to < 4.5: Slight improvement towards productive and sustainable agriculture.
• 4.5 to 5: Improvement towards productive and sustainable agriculture.
